question: Will Hezbollah of Lebanon be fully disarmed before June, 2026?
reason: Hezbollah's consistent rejection of disarmament plans and ongoing military activities make full disarmament by May 31, 2026, highly unlikely.
evidence: Hezbollah rejected the Lebanese government's disarmament plan and four-month timeline in February 2026. ([al-monitor.com](https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/02/hezbollah-rejects-disarmament-plan-and-governments-four-month-timeline?utm_source=openai))

Israeli military operations targeting Hezbollah positions in southern Lebanon and the Bekaa Valley have intensified, indicating ongoing hostilities. ([lemonde.fr](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/international/article/2026/05/27/israel-launches-new-military-escalation-in-lebanon_6753865_4.html?utm_source=openai))

Lebanon's Homeland Shield Plan, initiated in September 2025, has faced significant challenges, with Hezbollah's resistance hindering progress. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Homeland_Shield_Plan?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: Hezbollah disarmament status May 2026 Lebanon international news
